task_description: Phase 20: Real Trust & Safety (legal liability layer). Eliminate criminal-negligence risk of NoOp CSAM matcher. Build the safety stack that lets you ship UGC at all. Includes CSAM hash matching, perceptual hashing, text/image/video classification, live moderation, account integrity, appeals workflow, age gating, safety microfeatures, and DPIA documentation.

verification.summary: All 5 features implemented and review issues addressed. @quant/moderation: 350 tests (27 test files), typecheck/build/lint clean. @quant/moderation-worker: 26 tests (6 files), typecheck/build/lint clean. Critical review fixes applied: CSPRNG for OTP codes, fail-closed CSAM timeout handling, env-gated video backend, concurrent-safe scorecard mapping, multi-match grooming sensitivity.
